name: Manas Sandeep Nerkar
cover_letter_template: I am excited to apply for the {role} position at {company}. With hands-on experience in B2B product marketing, go-to-market strategy, and technical content creation within industrial automation and robotics sectors, I am confident I can deliver strong results for your team. My background working with cross-functional and cross-cultural teams equips me well for a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

experience.title: Product Marketing & Field Intern
highlights: Developed product positioning insights by translating complex technical requirements into clear operational value propositions
Supported go-to-market activity for industrial automation products across multiple client sites
Built deep product knowledge enabling technical content creation including product briefings and competitive comparisons

experience.title: Research & Marketing Intern
highlights: Conducted performance analysis and technical data collection on automation systems
Collaborated across a multinational team, strengthening cross-cultural communication and stakeholder management skills
